examples:
Command Example
#
!alphavantage-stock-history-get symbol=PANW interval=5min output_size=compact
Context Example
#
{
"AlphaVantage"
:

outputs.description: Info about each time series AlphaVantage.StockHistory.Interval Time interval between two data samples
outputs.name: AlphaVantage.StockHistory.Information

outputs.description: Last time the API data was refreshed AlphaVantage.StockHistory.Output Size Amount of data. Either last 100 samples or as much as possible
outputs.name: AlphaVantage.StockHistory.Last Refreshed

outputs.description: Stock symbol AlphaVantage.StockHistory.Time Series List of all stock data samples
outputs.name: AlphaVantage.StockHistory.Symbol
